execution_environment.rule: Use the server real environment for validation, report regeneration, and dependency-sensitive checks. The local mounted mirror is acceptable for lightweight report editing.

headline_claim_boundary: CadStruct-MoE should be written as a reviewed SVG/contract normalized-candidate graph-recognition result. P301 relation F1 is an internal locked fine-threshold audit, not external validation and not runtime raster performance.

primary_quantitative_result.metric_role: reviewed SVG/contract normalized-candidate main result plus internal locked fine-threshold relation audit

external_validation_status.decision: Do not make external/source-heldout generalization claims for P301 or for RoomSpace/SymbolFixture/TextDimension.

wall_opening.claim: zero-shot source transfer is not supported

external_validation_status.relation_heldout_boundary: relation_no_repair_heldout_scorer_v1 is internal record-heldout within the locked benchmark, not external source validation.

end_to_end_outputs.role: end-to-end SVG-derived candidate graph export with loaded expert checkpoints
end_to_end_outputs.interpretation: This is a registered-checkpoint E2E smoke path on SVG-derived candidates. It is useful for demonstrating export and failure modes, not for replacing P301 as the main paper metric.
Use only as a contract/export sanity check. The perfect score indicates gold-compatible export behavior and should not be presented as model recognition performance.

end_to_end_outputs.role: qualitative E2E visualization candidate for paper figures
end_to_end_outputs.source_dataset_policy: Only CubiCasa5K/CubiCasa samples are used in this visual demo.
end_to_end_outputs.interpretation: Use as qualitative E2E output: input, overlay, and side-by-side graph rendering. Do not describe as source-heldout or pure raster.

end_to_end_outputs.role: negative image-only E2E evidence and runtime-source-integrity reference
end_to_end_outputs.interpretation: Useful as a limitation/failure-analysis artifact. It proves source-integrity checks can pass, but pure image-only proposal quality is not adoption-ready.

end_to_end_outputs.role: bounded secondary runtime raster adapter evidence
end_to_end_outputs.claim_boundary: Secondary runtime raster adapter evidence only. Main paper claim remains SVG/contract CadStruct-MoE.

main_renderer.role: SVG/HTML-first renderer for CadStruct-MoE scene graph visual demos; emits SVG and PNG when rsvg-convert is available.
important_behavior: maps scene-graph bboxes to the image canvas
emits overlay_only, overlay_on_image, side_by_side, per-sample summary, sample manifest, coverage audit, and review pack
selects warning/uncertain cases so the review pack is not only best-case recognition

hard_case_renderer.role: deterministic visual hard-case pack for raster-only MoE debugging
hard_case_renderer.paper_use: Use for error analysis or appendix only; it is not the main visual result.

recommended_paper_materials.use: Reviewed SVG/contract normalized-candidate result; relation F1 is internal locked fine-threshold audit; external generalization blocked by P305.
Use the v13 real E2E side-by-side or paper_candidate_figure asset.
Mention P262/P263 only as bounded secondary raster adapter evidence, not as the main claim.
State external/source-heldout generalization is not established; image-only v14/v18 remains non-adopted; generic_symbol remains weak at 0.784314.

do_not_claim: Do not call P301 externally validated.
Do not claim source-heldout generalization for RoomSpace, SymbolFixture, or TextDimension.
Do not use relation_no_repair_heldout_scorer_v1 as external source validation.
Do not claim runtime raster generalization from SVG/contract metrics.
Do not present scene_graph_f1_locked_smoke_eval.json perfect scores as model recognition performance.
Do not present image_only_moe_e2e_v14 as adopted or successful; it is negative E2E evidence.
manuscript_ready_summary: CadStruct-MoE is currently strongest as a reviewed SVG/contract normalized-candidate graph-recognition system. The packaged P301 line reaches node macro-F1 0.962907 and node accuracy 0.982498, with relation F1 0.929782 under an internal locked fine-threshold audit and invalid graph rate 0.0. Qualitative end-to-end outputs are available through the v13 real E2E visual demo and SVG-derived locked-smoke scene-graph exports. External/source-heldout generalization should not be claimed: P305 found only weak WallOpening transfer evidence and blocked RoomSpace, SymbolFixture, and TextDimension pending new external labels.
